name: Pasta Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare angel hair pasta as directed on package.
2. Rinse and drain. Set aside.
3. In a 6-inch nonstick skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add chopped green pepper and onion. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring frequently. Set aside.
5. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Spread the cooked angel hair pasta evenly in the skillet.
7. Cook for 4 to 6 minutes or until lightly browned on the underside.
8. Turn the pasta crust onto a plate.
9. Place the crust back into the skillet, browned-side up. Reduce heat to medium.
10. Spoon the low-fat pasta sauce evenly over the crust.
11. Top with the prepared vegetables and sliced black olives. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella and Italian seasoning.
12. Cover and cook for 4 to 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
13. Cut pizza into wedges and serve.
